products.name: Chile Chardonnay
products.description: Bursting with hints of pineapple, melon, and peach on the palate, delicate hints of pear on the finish. A perfectly balanced wine with fresh and lively acidity.
products.tasting_notes: Bursting with hints of pineapple, melon, and peach on the palate, delicate hints of pear on the finish. A perfectly balanced wine with fresh and lively acidity.

products.name: Italy Pinot Grigio
products.description: Opens with citrus, floral, and pear notes. Hints of citrus and green apple on the finish. The palate is elevated with its perfect harmony of fruit and crisp acidity.
products.tasting_notes: Opens with citrus, floral, and pear notes. Hints of citrus and green apple on the finish. The palate is elevated with its perfect harmony of fruit and crisp acidity.

products.name: South Africa Sauvignon Blanc
products.description: Aromas of apple, lemon, and kiwi on the nose and hints of lemon and herbaceous flavours on the palate. Expect a zesty finish to this elegant wine.
products.tasting_notes: Aromas of apple, lemon, and kiwi on the nose and hints of lemon and herbaceous flavours on the palate. Expect a zesty finish to this elegant wine.

products.name: Winemaker's Trio White
products.description: This refined Pinot Grigio, Sauvignon Blanc, and Muscat blend exudes pretty floral aromas with hints of tropical fruit and lychee. Flavours on the palate include juicy pineapple, mango, peach, and lychee.
products.tasting_notes: This refined Pinot Grigio, Sauvignon Blanc, and Muscat blend exudes pretty floral aromas with hints of tropical fruit and lychee. Flavours on the palate include juicy pineapple, mango, peach, and lychee.

products.name: Australia Cabernet Sauvignon
products.description: This complex, full-bodied wine has an appealing aroma of plump blackberries, sweet vanilla, and fresh violets while cherries, pepper spice, and rich tannins grace the palate.
products.tasting_notes: This complex, full-bodied wine has an appealing aroma of plump blackberries, sweet vanilla, and fresh violets while cherries, pepper spice, and rich tannins grace the palate.

products.name: Australia Cabernet Shiraz
products.description: A fruit forward blend with firm tannins and notes of cassis and toast and vanilla flavours from the American oak create a balanced classic wine.
products.tasting_notes: A fruit forward blend with firm tannins and notes of cassis and toast and vanilla flavours from the American oak create a balanced classic wine.

products.name: Australia Pinot Noir
products.description: An elegant wine bursting with flavours of ripe black cherries, red berry fruits, and delicate spice notes on the palate superbly balanced with oak.
products.tasting_notes: An elegant wine bursting with flavours of ripe black cherries, red berry fruits, and delicate spice notes on the palate superbly balanced with oak.

products.name: Australia Shiraz
products.description: Warm black fruit and berries entice the nose, while concentrated flavours of red fruit, oak, and chocolate round out the experience of this satisfying medium-bodied wine.
products.tasting_notes: Warm black fruit and berries entice the nose, while concentrated flavours of red fruit, oak, and chocolate round out the experience of this satisfying medium-bodied wine.

products.name: Chile Malbec
products.description: A brilliant bouquet of dark fruits with subtle hints of oak, vanilla, and spices. Strong plum and berry flavours are balanced by moderate tannins on the palate.
products.tasting_notes: A brilliant bouquet of dark fruits with subtle hints of oak, vanilla, and spices. Strong plum and berry flavours are balanced by moderate tannins on the palate.

products.name: Chile Merlot
products.description: A classic wine with a rich aromatic bouquet of fresh red cherries, toasted oak, and herbs. Expressive flavours of dark ripe plums, berries, and silky tannins on the palate.
products.tasting_notes: A classic wine with a rich aromatic bouquet of fresh red cherries, toasted oak, and herbs. Expressive flavours of dark ripe plums, berries, and silky tannins on the palate.

products.name: Italy Amarone Style
products.description: A spicy bouquet with black cherry, tobacco, licorice, and coffee notes. The palate is big, round, and flavourful with delicious dark fruit, leather, cassis, and pepper notes.
products.tasting_notes: A spicy bouquet with black cherry, tobacco, licorice, and coffee notes. The palate is big, round, and flavourful with delicious dark fruit, leather, cassis, and pepper notes.

products.name: Italy Rosso Grande Eccellente
products.description: A delectable bouquet of sweet ripe berries, spices, and farm cherries, and firmly structured tannins. This assertive wine is bold in all aspects.
products.tasting_notes: A delectable bouquet of sweet ripe berries, spices, and farm cherries, and firmly structured tannins. This assertive wine is bold in all aspects.

products.name: Italy Super Tuscan
products.description: An assertive wine with aromatics of fresh raspberries supported by subtle hints of vanilla and earth. A concentrated palate of blackberries and black pepper with firm tannins.
products.tasting_notes: An assertive wine with aromatics of fresh raspberries supported by subtle hints of vanilla and earth. A concentrated palate of blackberries and black pepper with firm tannins.

products.name: Italy Valpola
products.description: A fruit forward nose with aromas of raisins, dark cherries, and toasted oak. Notes of sweet chocolate, prunes and firm tannins grace the palate.
products.tasting_notes: A fruit forward nose with aromas of raisins, dark cherries, and toasted oak. Notes of sweet chocolate, prunes and firm tannins grace the palate.

products.name: Italy Zinfandel
products.description: A bouquet of black cherries and plump dark fruit are framed by the ample aromas of tobacco and dark coffee. Fruit forward with an array of spicy flavours on the finish.
products.tasting_notes: A bouquet of black cherries and plump dark fruit are framed by the ample aromas of tobacco and dark coffee. Fruit forward with an array of spicy flavours on the finish.

products.name: Spain Grenache Syrah
products.description: A nose and palate brimming with spicy black pepper notes, dried dark fruit, earth, and a hint of tobacco, with a lengthy and elegant finish.
products.tasting_notes: A nose and palate brimming with spicy black pepper notes, dried dark fruit, earth, and a hint of tobacco, with a lengthy and elegant finish.

products.name: Winemaker's Trio Red
products.description: A modern, new world style wine featuring a blend of Cabernet Sauvignon, Syrah, and Zinfandel. Aromas of vanilla, red berries, and black cherries and sweet flavours of ripe raspberry, chocolate, and cherry.
products.tasting_notes: A modern, new world style wine featuring a blend of Cabernet Sauvignon, Syrah, and Zinfandel. Aromas of vanilla, red berries, and black cherries and sweet flavours of ripe raspberry, chocolate, and cherry.

products.name: Chile Carménère
products.description: This opulent and rich, Carménère boasts the luscious flavours of red cherries and berries, with hints of spice and leather enhanced by robust tannins.
products.tasting_notes: This opulent and rich, Carménère boasts the luscious flavours of red cherries and berries, with hints of spice and leather enhanced by robust tannins.

products.name: Argentina Style Trio
products.description: This modern New World white highlights the apricot and floral notes of Viognier, the minerality of Riesling, and the tropical aromas of Chardonnay.
products.tasting_notes: This modern New World white highlights the apricot and floral notes of Viognier, the minerality of Riesling, and the tropical aromas of Chardonnay.

products.name: Australia Style Chardonnay
products.description: A classic style Chardonnay that is clean, crisp, and rich in varietal character with fruit flavours abound. It is golden-hued and slightly tart while flavours of vanilla and cloves tantalize the palate.
products.tasting_notes: A classic style Chardonnay that is clean, crisp, and rich in varietal character with fruit flavours abound. It is golden-hued and slightly tart while flavours of vanilla and cloves tantalize the palate.

products.name: Australia Style Viognier Pinot Gris
products.description: This popular Australian white blend is extremely aromatic, opening with apricots and pear notes and finishing on a refreshing fruit forward note.
products.tasting_notes: This popular Australian white blend is extremely aromatic, opening with apricots and pear notes and finishing on a refreshing fruit forward note.

products.name: Germany Style Gewürztraminer
products.description: Spicy notes, typical of Gew�rztraminer are complemented by aromas of roses, lychees and tropical fruit. Elderflowers bring out intense fruity characteristics.
products.tasting_notes: Spicy notes, typical of Gewürztraminer are complemented by aromas of roses, lychees and tropical fruit. Elderflowers bring out intense fruity characteristics.

products.name: Italy Style Bella Bianco
products.description: This modern and bold Italian style white blend is extraordinarily rich, with buttery aromas and flavours that are balanced by lush tropical fruit and full oak character.
products.tasting_notes: This modern and bold Italian style white blend is extraordinarily rich, with buttery aromas and flavours that are balanced by lush tropical fruit and full oak character.

products.name: Italy Style Pinot Grigio
products.description: Made in an Italian style, the bouquet reveals bright citrus and green apple aromas with honeydew tones; an exquisite balance of citrus and acidity.
products.tasting_notes: Made in an Italian style, the bouquet reveals bright citrus and green apple aromas with honeydew tones; an exquisite balance of citrus and acidity.

products.name: New Zealand Style Sauvignon Blanc
products.description: This renowned New Zealand wine presents soft hues in the glass. It is crisp and light, with intense flavours of grapefruit peel, freshly cut grass, and light oak on the finish.
products.tasting_notes: This renowned New Zealand wine presents soft hues in the glass. It is crisp and light, with intense flavours of grapefruit peel, freshly cut grass, and light oak on the finish.

products.name: Amarone Style
products.description: This classic Italian style wine is packed with rich raspberry, black- berry and cassis flavours. Deep, dark, and inviting, the finish is long, lingering, and full of ripe tannins.
products.tasting_notes: This classic Italian style wine is packed with rich raspberry, black- berry and cassis flavours. Deep, dark, and inviting, the finish is long, lingering, and full of ripe tannins.

products.name: Australia Style Cabernet Sauvignon
products.description: Soft yet fruity, this Australian style Cab shows more complex varietal fruit flavours, including cherry and blackberry, than its Old World counterpart.
products.tasting_notes: Soft yet fruity, this Australian style Cab shows more complex varietal fruit flavours, including cherry and blackberry, than its Old World counterpart.

products.name: Australia Style Shiraz
products.description: Deep and dark in colour with a rich bouquet of fruit and a hint of cassis, this is the Shiraz that put Australian wines on the map. It will age into a velvety wine of pure elegance.
products.tasting_notes: Deep and dark in colour with a rich bouquet of fruit and a hint of cassis, this is the Shiraz that put Australian wines on the map. It will age into a velvety wine of pure elegance.

products.name: California Style Cabernet Syrah Zinfandel
products.description: This is a classic big, bold California red blend. It exudes pronounced flavours of black cherries and berries layered with toasted oak, vanilla, and rich notes of dark chocolate and coffee.
products.tasting_notes: This is a classic big, bold California red blend. It exudes pronounced flavours of black cherries and berries layered with toasted oak, vanilla, and rich notes of dark chocolate and coffee.

products.name: California Style Pinot Noir
products.description: This New World California style Pinot Noir features a bouquet of rich tobacco and ripe dark cherries. The hint of oak and velvety tannins on the palate are a pleasant surprise.
products.tasting_notes: This New World California style Pinot Noir features a bouquet of rich tobacco and ripe dark cherries. The hint of oak and velvety tannins on the palate are a pleasant surprise.

products.name: Chile Style Malbec
products.description: Aromas of crushed blackberries and vanilla follow through to a densely packed palate boasting chocolate and abundant oak tones. This wine showcases the Malbec grape at its best.
products.tasting_notes: Aromas of crushed blackberries and vanilla follow through to a densely packed palate boasting chocolate and abundant oak tones. This wine showcases the Malbec grape at its best.

products.name: France Style Merlot
products.description: Impressive aromas of farm fresh strawberries, violets, and vanilla framed with soft, silky tannins. Powerful notes of ripe raspberries, cherries, and dark fruit on the palate. A true French classic wine.
products.tasting_notes: Impressive aromas of farm fresh strawberries, violets, and vanilla framed with soft, silky tannins. Powerful notes of ripe raspberries, cherries, and dark fruit on the palate. A true French classic wine.

products.name: Italy Style Nebbiolo
products.description: Made from the prized Nebbiolo grape, this wine features flavours of violet, cherries, and cocoa. Undertones of toasted oak, dark fruit and firm acidity dominate the long finish.
products.tasting_notes: Made from the prized Nebbiolo grape, this wine features flavours of violet, cherries, and cocoa. Undertones of toasted oak, dark fruit and firm acidity dominate the long finish.

products.name: Italy Style Sangiovese
products.description: This deep ruby red wine with aromas of tobacco, ripe plums and black cherries will remind you of Tuscany. The palate offers explosive notes of blackberries, prunes, and vanilla.
products.tasting_notes: This deep ruby red wine with aromas of tobacco, ripe plums and black cherries will remind you of Tuscany. The palate offers explosive notes of blackberries, prunes, and vanilla.

products.name: Italy Style Valpola
products.description: An aroma reminiscent of farm fresh cherries backed by streaks of dark chocolate. Toasted oak on the palate helps it age into an Italian style wine of award winning potential.
products.tasting_notes: An aroma reminiscent of farm fresh cherries backed by streaks of dark chocolate. Toasted oak on the palate helps it age into an Italian style wine of award winning potential.

products.name: Black Forest Dessert Wine
products.description: Bursting with rich aromas of red and dark cherry, this full-flavoured dessert wine style also has a hint of dark chocolate fused with plum and toasted oak on the nose.
products.tasting_notes: Bursting with rich aromas of red and dark cherry, this full-flavoured dessert wine style also has a hint of dark chocolate fused with plum and toasted oak on the nose.

products.name: Toasted Caramel Dessert Wine
products.description: Intensely creamy and pleasantly sweet, this full-bodied dessert wine combines rich caramel aroma with the robust flavours of red fruit. The buttery caramel notes give this wine a roundness and texture on the palate that is perfectly balanced with rich toasted notes on the finish.
products.tasting_notes: Intensely creamy and pleasantly sweet, this full-bodied dessert wine combines rich caramel aroma with the robust flavours of red fruit. The buttery caramel notes give this wine a roundness and texture on the palate that is perfectly balanced with rich toasted notes on the finish.

products.name: Spain Macabeo (January 2026)
products.description: Pear and citrus shine upfront, lifted by soft white floral notes. A touch of grapefruit juice and stone fruit brings energy qnd dimension to this vibrant expressive white
products.tasting_notes: Pear and citrus shine upfront, lifted by soft white floral notes. A touch of grapefruit juice and stone fruit brings energy qnd dimension to this vibrant expressive white

products.name: Italy Nebbiolo (October 2025)
products.description: Tart cherry and raisin with supple leather and a smoky undertone. Blackbery and plum add rustic depth to this wine of grit and grace.
products.tasting_notes: Tart cherry and raisin with supple leather and a smoky undertone. Blackbery and plum add rustic depth to this wine of grit and grace.

products.name: Italy Zinfandel Cabernet (November 2025)
products.description: A bold blend of black currant and dried fruit lifted by silky vanilla. Ripe plum and a hint of mocha round out the lush fill-bodies finish.
products.tasting_notes: A bold blend of black currant and dried fruit lifted by silky vanilla. Ripe plum and a hint of mocha round out the lush fill-bodies finish.

products.name: Spain Monastrell (February 2026)
products.description: Muddled blackbery and ripe strawberry meet a dash of cracked pepper in this rich, fruit-forward red. Subtle cherry and jam notes give it a warm rustic charm.
products.tasting_notes: Muddled blackbery and ripe strawberry meet a dash of cracked pepper in this rich, fruit-forward red. Subtle cherry and jam notes give it a warm rustic charm.

products.name: Chile Carménère Malbec (March 2026)
products.description: Deep plum and roasted pepper meet a core of licorice and cherry. Savoury and layered, with fine tannins and a whisper of leather that lingers on the finish.
products.tasting_notes: Deep plum and roasted pepper meet a core of licorice and cherry. Savoury and layered, with fine tannins and a whisper of leather that lingers on the finish.

products.name: California Chardonnay Style
products.description: Captivating flavours of green apple and tropical fruit enhance an upfront floral bouquet as is expected by the finest California Chardonnays. It will develop to reveal layers of ripe fruit and integrated oak.
products.tasting_notes: Captivating flavours of green apple and tropical fruit enhance an upfront floral bouquet as is expected by the finest California Chardonnays. It will develop to reveal layers of ripe fruit and integrated oak.

products.name: California Muscat Style
products.description: A luscious blend with flavours and aromas of peach, apricot, baked apple, and pear. This soft white crowd-pleasing California wine also has a hint of tropical fruit.
products.tasting_notes: A luscious blend with flavours and aromas of peach, apricot, baked apple, and pear. This soft white crowd-pleasing California wine also has a hint of tropical fruit.

products.name: California White Zinfandel Style
products.description: This easy drinking, classically California style blush offers fresh floral notes on the nose and pleasing berry flavours with a soft, off-dry finish on the palate.
products.tasting_notes: This easy drinking, classically California style blush offers fresh floral notes on the nose and pleasing berry flavours with a soft, off-dry finish on the palate.

products.name: France Rosé Style
products.description: Made in the classic French rosé style, it is light bodied and pink in colour with spiced strawberry and crisp, citrus aromas. The palate features fresh strawberry flavours with a refreshing fruity finish.
products.tasting_notes: Made in the classic French rosé style, it is light bodied and pink in colour with spiced strawberry and crisp, citrus aromas. The palate features fresh strawberry flavours with a refreshing fruity finish.

products.name: Germany Gewürztraminer Style
products.description: Made in the style of one of Germany's most renowned whites, this Gew�rztraminer style is balanced and crisp with bold tropical fruits on the palate.
products.tasting_notes: Made in the style of one of Germany's most renowned whites, this Gewürztraminer style is balanced and crisp with bold tropical fruits on the palate.

products.name: Germany Müller-Thurgau Style
products.description: Made from a quintessential German white grape variety, this wine features subtle fruit notes and a mild acidity. Its long and lasting finish will leave you wanting more.
products.tasting_notes: Made from a quintessential German white grape variety, this wine features subtle fruit notes and a mild acidity. Its long and lasting finish will leave you wanting more.

products.name: Italy Pinot Grigio Style
products.description: An enticing deep apple and grape- fruit bouquet with apple and citrus notes that follow through to the palate and linger with a dry finish. This Pinot Grigio is made in the true northern Italian style.
products.tasting_notes: An enticing deep apple and grape- fruit bouquet with apple and citrus notes that follow through to the palate and linger with a dry finish. This Pinot Grigio is made in the true northern Italian style.

products.name: Ontario Sauvignon Blanc Style
products.description: Straw in colour with a refreshing grassy nose; bold herbal tones and fresh citrus flavours on the palate. This wine is as delightful as a cool Ontario Fall day, its finish both long and fruity.
products.tasting_notes: Straw in colour with a refreshing grassy nose; bold herbal tones and fresh citrus flavours on the palate. This wine is as delightful as a cool Ontario Fall day, its finish both long and fruity.

products.name: South Africa Chenin Blanc Style
products.description: The fruity nose has hints of green apple and lemon with a subtle floral bouquet. On the palate, true to its South African origins, it is delightfully refreshing.
products.tasting_notes: The fruity nose has hints of green apple and lemon with a subtle floral bouquet. On the palate, true to its South African origins, it is delightfully refreshing.

products.name: Germany Riesling Style
products.description: Clean, crisp, and slightly fruity, this wine is full of fruit flavour with an intense and pleasing aroma. You will want to savour through to the last sip.
products.tasting_notes: Clean, crisp, and slightly fruity, this wine is full of fruit flavour with an intense and pleasing aroma. You will want to savour through to the last sip.

products.name: Ontario Pinot Grigio Style
products.description: A dry wine with overtones of green melon leading to a crisp, clean finish. A bouquet of honey and herbs combined with aromas of clove, nutmeg and butterscotch from the addition of oak, completes the experience of this perennially favourite white.
products.tasting_notes: A dry wine with overtones of green melon leading to a crisp, clean finish. A bouquet of honey and herbs combined with aromas of clove, nutmeg and butterscotch from the addition of oak, completes the experience of this perennially favourite white.

products.name: Italy Verdicchio Style
products.description: Herbal aromas dominate the bouquet, while flavours of lemon and pear entice the palate. The finish is crisp and clean. A refreshing style white wine.
products.tasting_notes: Herbal aromas dominate the bouquet, while flavours of lemon and pear entice the palate. The finish is crisp and clean. A refreshing style white wine.

products.name: Australia Cabernet Sauvignon Style
products.description: A classic Cabernet Sauvignon with a nose of blackcurrants, dark chocolate, and subtle toasty notes with hints of coffee and vanilla notes on the palate.
products.tasting_notes: A classic Cabernet Sauvignon with a nose of blackcurrants, dark chocolate, and subtle toasty notes with hints of coffee and vanilla notes on the palate.

products.name: British Columbia Pinot Noir Style
products.description: As one would expect from a BC style Pinot Noir, this wine features aromas of black cherries and fresh strawberries. Silky tannins while subtle notes of pepper and spice round out the palate.
products.tasting_notes: As one would expect from a BC style Pinot Noir, this wine features aromas of black cherries and fresh strawberries. Silky tannins while subtle notes of pepper and spice round out the palate.

products.name: California Syrah Style
products.description: Raspberries and peppery spice blend in harmony to create an elegant flavour with soft, balanced tannins and a lingering, smooth finish. This is a California wine at its best.
products.tasting_notes: Raspberries and peppery spice blend in harmony to create an elegant flavour with soft, balanced tannins and a lingering, smooth finish. This is a California wine at its best.

products.name: California Zinfandel Style
products.description: California's prized grape creates a wine with a luscious bouquet of ripe black cherry and delicate spices. The palate boasts a hint of toasted oak with well-rounded, berry fruit, and a long finish.
products.tasting_notes: California's prized grape creates a wine with a luscious bouquet of ripe black cherry and delicate spices. The palate boasts a hint of toasted oak with well-rounded, berry fruit, and a long finish.

products.name: Chile Malbec Style
products.description: Warm spice notes and aromas and flavours of ripe blackberry and blackcurrant. Chile is well known for these chewy, deep, rustic red wines with intense cherry flavours and blended oak undertones.
products.tasting_notes: Warm spice notes and aromas and flavours of ripe blackberry and blackcurrant. Chile is well known for these chewy, deep, rustic red wines with intense cherry flavours and blended oak undertones.

products.name: Italy Nebbiolo Style
products.description: Luxurious flavours of dark plums and chocolate greet the nose, while hints of blackberries, toasted oak, and spices are found on the palate of this great Italian classic.
products.tasting_notes: Luxurious flavours of dark plums and chocolate greet the nose, while hints of blackberries, toasted oak, and spices are found on the palate of this great Italian classic.

products.name: Washington Merlot Style
products.description: A cooler climate style Merlot from Washington, this wine features classic flavours of cassis and chocolate. It is dark and rich with complex notes of blackberries and velvety tannins.
products.tasting_notes: A cooler climate style Merlot from Washington, this wine features classic flavours of cassis and chocolate. It is dark and rich with complex notes of blackberries and velvety tannins.

products.name: California Cabernet Sauvignon Style
products.description: A hint of violet is present in the bouquet, typical of this variety. It's superbly enhanced with the addition of oak, and while it can be drunk young, it also does well with age.
products.tasting_notes: A hint of violet is present in the bouquet, typical of this variety. It's superbly enhanced with the addition of oak, and while it can be drunk young, it also does well with age.

products.name: Chile Merlot Style
products.description: A smooth, rich wine, medium dark in colour with notes of blackberry and currants. A hint of green olive in the bouquet will pleasantly surprise and delight you.
products.tasting_notes: A smooth, rich wine, medium dark in colour with notes of blackberry and currants. A hint of green olive in the bouquet will pleasantly surprise and delight you.

products.name: Apple Cider
products.description: The taste of delicious orchard apples, light and crisp with a juicy apple bite. Enjoy any time, chilled or on ice.
products.tasting_notes: The taste of delicious orchard apples, light and crisp with a juicy apple bite. Enjoy any time, chilled or on ice.

products.name: Pear Cider
products.description: From the juiciest pears comes the best pear cider. This cider has a sweet mellow pear flavour which satisfies any thirst.
products.tasting_notes: From the juiciest pears comes the best pear cider. This cider has a sweet mellow pear flavour which satisfies any thirst.

products.name: Mixed Berry Cider
products.description: A sweet apple base with a refreshing burst of summer berries including delicious raspberries and blackcurrants. Serve over ice.
products.tasting_notes: A sweet apple base with a refreshing burst of summer berries including delicious raspberries and blackcurrants. Serve over ice.

products.name: Peach Passion Cider
products.description: Light and fizzy combining both sweet and sour flavours. The sweet peach lifts the tangy passion fruit, making a very refreshing summer cider.
products.tasting_notes: Light and fizzy combining both sweet and sour flavours. The sweet peach lifts the tangy passion fruit, making a very refreshing summer cider.

products.name: Strawberry Pear Cider
products.description: Fresh strawberries coupled with juicy pear. This cider is sweet and fruity, especially good when served chilled on a hot summer's eve.
products.tasting_notes: Fresh strawberries coupled with juicy pear. This cider is sweet and fruity, especially good when served chilled on a hot summer's eve.

products.name: Elderflower & Lime Cider
products.description: Fresh citrus lime and warm floral notes of elderflower intermingled with fresh and fruity apple. A winning combination, the sharpness of lime with sweet fruity apple will make your taste buds tingle.
products.tasting_notes: Fresh citrus lime and warm floral notes of elderflower intermingled with fresh and fruity apple. A winning combination, the sharpness of lime with sweet fruity apple will make your taste buds tingle.

products.name: Hopped Apple Cider
products.description: Crisp and refreshing, the fruity and sweet taste of delicious orchard apples is complimented with tropical hop notes.
products.tasting_notes: Crisp and refreshing, the fruity and sweet taste of delicious orchard apples is complimented with tropical hop notes.

products.name: Rosé Cider
products.description: Sweet apple and strawberry are rounded off by floral and hibiscus notes that are contrasted nicely with subtle hints of oak.
products.tasting_notes: Sweet apple and strawberry are rounded off by floral and hibiscus notes that are contrasted nicely with subtle hints of oak.

products.name: Raspberry Lime Cider
products.description: Bold aroma and flavour of fresh, juicy raspberries with a brilliant sharp lime finish. Wonderfully thirst quenching and moreish.
products.tasting_notes: Bold aroma and flavour of fresh, juicy raspberries with a brilliant sharp lime finish. Wonderfully thirst quenching and moreish.

products.name: Vinifera Caberlot
products.description: This popular blend of Cabernet Sauvignon and Merlot is extremely well-known. It is warm, full bodied, and intense. This wine will provide a beautiful berry bouquet along with full oaky characteristics. The lush, soft character of Merlot is the perfect foil for Cabernet's intensity, resulting in a smooth red wine.
products.tasting_notes: This popular blend of Cabernet Sauvignon and Merlot is extremely well-known. It is warm, full bodied, and intense. This wine will provide a beautiful berry bouquet along with full oaky characteristics. The lush, soft character of Merlot is the perfect foil for Cabernet’s intensity, resulting in a smooth red wine.

products.name: Cabernet Sauvignon Style
products.description: A balanced classic Cabernet Sauvignon with berry, toast and vanilla aromas and berry flavour with well integrated oak.
products.tasting_notes: A balanced classic Cabernet Sauvignon with berry, toast and vanilla aromas and berry flavour with well integrated oak.

products.name: California Style White
products.description: This crisp, light and refreshing blend captures the casual mood of a picnic or summer barbecue.
products.tasting_notes: This crisp, light and refreshing blend captures the casual mood of a picnic or summer barbecue.

products.name: Chardonnay Style
products.description: A traditional style dry and lightly oaked Chardonnay with pear, apple, herbal and mineral notes and a crisp finish.
products.tasting_notes: A traditional style dry and lightly oaked Chardonnay with pear, apple, herbal and mineral notes and a crisp finish.

products.name: Pinot Grigio Style
products.description: A typical dry Pinot Grigio, this wine boasts aromas of tart green apple with crisp citrus and honey flavours.
products.tasting_notes: A typical dry Pinot Grigio, this wine boasts aromas of tart green apple with crisp citrus and honey flavours.

products.name: Riesling Style
products.description: A classic dry and medium bodied Riesling with floral and ripe fruit aromas, light mineral notes and a refreshing acidity.
products.tasting_notes: A classic dry and medium bodied Riesling with floral and ripe fruit aromas, light mineral notes and a refreshing acidity.

products.name: Sauvignon Blanc Style
products.description: A refreshing, medium-bodied, dry Sauvignon Blanc with crisp, green apple flavours and pleasant herbal notes. Unoaked.
products.tasting_notes: A refreshing, medium-bodied, dry Sauvignon Blanc with crisp, green apple flavours and pleasant herbal notes. Unoaked.

products.name: Merlot Style
products.description: A medium-bodied and dry Merlot with aromas of tart strawberry and flavours of berries with light floral notes and a short clean finish.
products.tasting_notes: A medium-bodied and dry Merlot with aromas of tart strawberry and flavours of berries with light floral notes and a short clean finish.

products.name: Pinot Noir Style
products.description:
A dry and light-bodied wine with crisp acidity and very little tannin;
plenty of fruit flavour with some cherry and red berry notes.
products.tasting_notes: A dry and light-bodied wine with crisp acidity and very little tannin; plenty of fruit flavour with some cherry and red berry notes.

products.name: Shiraz Style
products.description:
A Shiraz with fruity aromas of ripe raspberry with floral and spice
nuances; dry and full-bodied with balanced acidity and soft tannins.
products.tasting_notes: A Shiraz with fruity aromas of ripe raspberry with floral and spice nuances; dry and full-bodied with balanced acidity and soft tannins.

products.name: Vieux Chateau Du Roi
products.description: A traditional, unoaked French style red wine with spice and berry fruit aromas, rich berry fruit on the palate and spicy notes in the finish.
products.tasting_notes: A traditional, unoaked French style red wine with spice and berry fruit aromas, rich berry fruit on the palate and spicy notes in the finish.

products.name: Acai Raspberry Rapture
products.description: Acai, a small dark purple fruit that is so tasty, that you can hardly believe it is also good for you. This intense fruit combined with sweet, ripe raspberries create a powerhouse of a wine.
products.tasting_notes: Acai, a small dark purple fruit that is so tasty, that you can hardly believe it is also good for you. This intense fruit combined with sweet, ripe raspberries create a powerhouse of a wine.

products.name: Blackberry Blast
products.description: Reward your passion for intense exotic flavours with this garnet-coloured red wine. Colourful tastes of juicy blackberries and ripe currants round out a truly flavourful experience to share with friends.
products.tasting_notes: Reward your passion for intense exotic flavours with this garnet-coloured red wine. Colourful tastes of juicy blackberries and ripe currants round out a truly flavourful experience to share with friends.

products.name: Blueberry Bliss
products.description: Experience the exciting combination of freshly picked blueberries with a delicate touch of tannins and structure. This off-dry red wine is best enjoyed chilled on a warm summer day.
products.tasting_notes: Experience the exciting combination of freshly picked blueberries with a delicate touch of tannins and structure. This off-dry red wine is best enjoyed chilled on a warm summer day.

products.name: Cranberry Craze
products.description: The crisp taste of fresh cranberries is harmoniously blended with fruity, velvety richness in this sweet, plum-red wine. The robust, yet elegant, sweet berry flavours make it a perfect backyard refresher.
products.tasting_notes: The crisp taste of fresh cranberries is harmoniously blended with fruity, velvety richness in this sweet, plum-red wine. The robust, yet elegant, sweet berry flavours make it a perfect backyard refresher.

products.name: Green Apple Delight
products.description: This popular, pale straw-coloured wine is intensely flavourful, reminiscent of a freshly cut crisp green apple. The pleasant soft acidity and luscious, fruity aroma make it refreshing on a hot summer day.
products.tasting_notes: This popular, pale straw-coloured wine is intensely flavourful, reminiscent of a freshly cut crisp green apple. The pleasant soft acidity and luscious, fruity aroma make it refreshing on a hot summer day.

products.name: Peach Perfection
products.description: The luscious scent of ripe peaches explodes from this exceptionally crisp, flavourful wine. Pale straw in colour, this wine is a natural addition to a lazy afternoon or an evening barbecue.
products.tasting_notes: The luscious scent of ripe peaches explodes from this exceptionally crisp, flavourful wine. Pale straw in colour, this wine is a natural addition to a lazy afternoon or an evening barbecue.

products.name: Mango Dragon Fruit Lemonade
products.description: This white fruit wine features the delicious flavours of mango, dragon fruit, coconut, and lemonade. Refreshing, and bright, Mango Dragon Fruit Lemonade is the quintessential summer sipper perfect for those warm summer afternoons.
products.tasting_notes: This white fruit wine features the delicious flavours of mango, dragon fruit, coconut, and lemonade. Refreshing, and bright, Mango Dragon Fruit Lemonade is the quintessential summer sipper perfect for those warm summer afternoons.

products.name: Rocking Raspberry Rose
products.description: This blush wine offer the succulent, mouth-watering flaours of sweet, ripe raspberries blended gracefully with a delectable refreshing rosé.
products.tasting_notes: This blush wine offer the succulent, mouth-watering flaours of sweet, ripe raspberries blended gracefully with a delectable refreshing rosé.

products.name: Seville Orange Sangria
products.description: Fresh and sweet juicy flavours are balanced by the bitterness of the Seville Orange in this popular red wine. Bring out your creative side by adding your favourite chopped fruit.
products.tasting_notes: Fresh and sweet juicy flavours are balanced by the bitterness of the Seville Orange in this popular red wine. Bring out your creative side by adding your favourite chopped fruit.

products.name: Strawberry Sensation
products.description: This light refreshing wine offers the delightfully sweet aroma of fresh picked strawberries blended with a rich melange of honey, tropical fruit and floral flavours.
products.tasting_notes: This light refreshing wine offers the delightfully sweet aroma of fresh picked strawberries blended with a rich mélange of honey, tropical fruit and floral flavours.

products.name: Tropical Lime
products.description: Fresh and zesty lime notes are perfectly balanced with the subtle flavours of coconut and citrus. One sip of this refreshing wine and you will be transported to a beach faraway!
products.tasting_notes: Fresh and zesty lime notes are perfectly balanced with the subtle flavours of coconut and citrus. One sip of this refreshing wine and you will be transported to a beach faraway!

products.name: Very Black Cherry
products.description: This off dry ruby red wine presents succulent flavours of fresh ripe black cherries balanced by a subtle touch of tannins. Light and fruity, this thirst quencher is a great addition to any summer festivity.
products.tasting_notes: This off dry ruby red wine presents succulent flavours of fresh ripe black cherries balanced by a subtle touch of tannins. Light and fruity, this thirst quencher is a great addition to any summer festivity.

products.name: Wild Watermelon
products.description: Serve a chilled glass at your next summer gathering or barbecue and impress your guests with a delicious wine that is perfect for sipping on a breezy summer day.
products.tasting_notes: Serve a chilled glass at your next summer gathering or barbecue and impress your guests with a delicious wine that is perfect for sipping on a breezy summer day.

products.name: Vinifera Pinot Grigio
products.tasting_notes: An important grape variety in several regions of the world including France, Italy and Oregon. A fine wine with an emphasis on exotic aromas; mango, apricot and tropical fruits.

products.name: Raspberry Mango Cider
products.description: Exploding with the taste of fresh raspberries with a subtle hint of sweet tropical mango.

products.name: Vinifera Gewürztraminer
products.description: Fruity and aromatic, this Gewürztraminer exudes flavors and smells of fresh apricots, peaches and lychee.
products.tasting_notes: Fruity and aromatic, this Gewürztraminer exudes flavors and smells of fresh apricots, peaches and lychee.

products.name: Crafted Series Apple Cider Kit
products.description: The taste of delicious orchard apples, light and crisp with a juicy apple bite. Enjoy any time, chilled or on ice.
products.tasting_notes: The taste of delicious orchard apples, light and crisp with a juicy apple bite. Enjoy any time, chilled or on ice.

ingredients.name: Gambrinus Pilsner Malt
ingredients.description:
Processed from the finest Canadian two-row available, this very low
protein base malt is versatile in a wide range of beer styles. Expect
delicate flavors of fresh barley, grain, honey, and bread, along with
distinctive nutty character and suggestions of vanilla when used as the
base for classic Pilsner, Kölsch, pale lager, Belgian ale, session IPA,
and blond ale; or as a portion of the grist for Hefeweizen or Witbier.

ingredients.name: Gambrinus Pale Malt
ingredients.description: Our plump 2-row European-style pale ale malt is the base for all beers, and is processed from premium Canadian 2-row barley. Gambrinus Pale Malt is known for its fresh barley and bready character with background notes of biscuit, grain, honey, and hints of nutty and green tea flavor. Use for styles where a rich malt flavor can be shown off, or where a strong malt backbone is needed to balance other strong flavors – IPA, pale ale, brown ale, golden ale, or Scottish and Belgian ales.

ingredients.name: Gambrinus Munich Light Malt
ingredients.description:
Seeking a well-balanced malty beer?  This plump, sweet, and mellow
Munich malt delivers impressions of toast, pretzel, toffee, and caramel,
with nutty and cereal grain background notes. Ideal as the base malt for
amber or red ales, Altbier, Scottish ales, and traditional Bavarian
lagers; we also recommend small inclusions for pale ale, IPA, and other
styles to intensify color and boost the perception of maltiness without
the sweetness of caramel malt.

ingredients.name: Gambrinus Munich Dark Malt
ingredients.description:
A very deeply-kilned Munich malt that combines the color and flavor
characteristics of roasted malt with the mellowness of Munich malt. As
up to 30% of the grain bill for dark lagers, Altbier, Doppelbock, dark
Belgian beers, and brown or red ales, Gambrinus Munich Dark 30L adds a
gorgeous red color with notes of bread crust, toffee, brown sugar,
caramel, cereal, and toast.

ingredients.name: Gambrinus Vienna Malt
ingredients.description:
This mellow kilned malt is the missing link between a Pale and Munich
malt. It is ideal for any amber beer, adding a balanced malty character
with strong suggestions of honey, toffee, and caramel. Use at up to 100%
for traditional Vienna, Märzen, and other amber beer styles, or as a
smaller fraction of the grist to add cereal, biscuit, and toasty notes
to pale ale or IPA, Kölsch and blonde ales, or Belgian styles.

ingredients.name: Gambrinus Chit Malt
ingredients.description:
Gambrinus Chit Malt is lightly modified and kilned to a low color, so it
retains the high molecular weight proteins that positively impact beer
foam, body, and haze without influencing beer color. Use at up to 10% of
the grist for traditional lagers or hazy IPA, or to improve head and
body in any style; higher percentages can be beneficial when brewing
low-ABV or NA beers.

ingredients.name: Rahr Malted Oats
ingredients.description:
Rahr Malted Oats is your new go-to for adding foam stability and a creamy texture to beer. Ideal for juicy or hazy IPA, stout, porter, or any beer style where increased foam development and silky mouthfeel is desired. Rahr Malted Oats bring earthy, grainy flavors as well as palate fullness.

It is high in protein, but low in color and beta glucans, which reduces the risk of slow or stuck lauter.

ingredients.name: Rahr Extra Pale Wheat
ingredients.description: Extra Pale White Wheat malt has the sweet malty flavor of other malted grains, with an irresistible light doughy aroma. Wheat malts are high in protein, which helps produce fuller-bodied beers. Wheat malt can improve head formation and retention, depending upon the other grist constituents. White wheat is easier to mill than red wheat, and more conducive to the haze characteristic of Belgian white beers. Rahr Extra Pale White Wheat is suitable for all wheat-style beers and anywhere its foam-forward contributions will be appreciated.

ingredients.name: OiO Rolled Oat Flakes
ingredients.description:
Mash ready oat flakes will add a distinct full- bodied flavour and
creamy texture. Can be used in amounts of up to 30% of grist total. This
is a pre- gelatinized flaked grain and does not require milling.

ingredients.name: OiO Flaked Corn
ingredients.description:
These are mash ready and will provide subtle flavor and mouthfeel
contributions to beer. Suitable for up to 40% of grist total. This is a
pre-gelatinized flaked grain that does not require milling. 89.9% extract.

ingredients.name: OiO Flaked Rice
ingredients.description:
Rice flakes will provide subtle flavor and mouthfeel contributions to
beer. Suitable for up to 40% of grist total. 89.9% extract.

ingredients.name: OiO Brewers Rice Hulls
ingredients.description: Parboiled rice hulls improve filter bed performance and reduce the risk of stuck sparge in adjunct-heavy mashes.

ingredients.name: Fermentis SafAle™ US-05 11.5g
ingredients.description: A ready-to-pitch dry American ale yeast, SafAle US-05 produces well balanced beers with low diacetyl and a very clean, crisp end palate. With medium sedimentations, and medium final gravities, this workhorse of a yeast is a perfect selection for many ale styles.

ingredients.name: Fermentis SafLager™ W-34/70 11.5g
ingredients.description: This famous brewer’s yeast strain from Weihenstephan in Germany is used worldwide. SafLager™ W-34/70 allows the brewing of beers with a good balance of floral and fruity aromas and gives clean flavors and high drinkable beers.

ingredients.name: Fermentis SafAle™ S-04 11.5g
ingredients.description: A well-known, commercial English ale yeast, selected for its fast fermentation character and its ability to form a very compact sediment at the end of the fermentation, helping to improve beer clarity.

ingredients.name: Fermentis SafAle™ WB-06 11.5g
ingredients.description: A specialty yeast selected for wheat beer fermentation. The yeast produces subtle estery and phenol flavor notes typical of wheat beers. The choice of Wheat or Weizen bier fans.

ingredients.name: Fermentis SafAle™ W-68 11.5g
ingredients.description:
Suitable for a variety of wheat beers and other styles with fruity-spicy
profiles, Fermentis SafAle™ W-68 produces aromatic beers rich in phenols
(notes of clove and pepper) and esters (floral and fruity banana
flavors). Known for medium sedimentation, this strain forms no clumps
and will appear as a powdery haze when resuspended in beer.

ingredients.name: Fermentis SafLager™ E-30 11.5g
ingredients.description: Described as the optimal yeast for revealing the esters in Lager beers, Fermentis SafLager™ E-30 produces higher levels of esters than other SafLager™ strains. When fermented at higher temperatures, some subtle isoamyl acetate production is possible. More attenuative than S-33 and S-189, SafLager™ E-30 is low in sulfur and diacetyl production. Featuring nice flocculation and sedimentation, it is suitable for various Asian-style lagers, Mexican lagers, Australasian lagers, American Light lagers and more.

ingredients.name: Fermentis SafAle™ BE-134 11.5g
ingredients.description:
Recommended for Belgian-style saisons and is characterized by a
particularly high attenuation. It gives fruity aromas with a spicy
character, particularly cloves. This strain will produce highly
refreshing and drinkable beers. Ideal fermentation temperature between
18-28°C (64.4-82.4°F). Slow sedimentation.

ingredients.name: Kerry Yeastex® 82
ingredients.description:
Yeastex® 82 is a formulation of specific yeast nutrients to increase yeast viability and activity during fermentation, allowing the end attenuation to be reached in a shorter time, and promoting consistent fermentation profiles.

Yeastex® 82 is a source of zinc and contains high levels of both inorganic and organic nitrogen and vitamins, making it particularly useful when brewing with low FAN malts and in high gravity worts. It should be slurried in a few gallons of water and added to the kettle about 15 minutes before strike-out.

ingredients.name: Lactic Acid 88%
ingredients.description:
88% solution. Used for mash pH adjustment, as well as acid balancing in
seltzers and FMBs.

ingredients.name: PBW
ingredients.description: PBW is a buffered alkaline detergent that has been proven to be more than an effective substitute for caustic soda cleaners. Because of its unique formulation of buffers and mild alkalis, it is safe on soft metals such as stainless steel, aluminum, and on plastics. P.B.W. uses active oxygen to penetrate carbon or protein soils and is not affected by hard water. The oxygen also helps in reducing B.O.D. and C.O.D. in wastewater, which is an added environmental benefit.

ingredients.name: Potassium Metabisulphite
ingredients.description:
Commonly used as a wine equipment sanitizer.

Potassium Metabisulfite is also used as an oxidation preventer and microorganism inhibitor in wine. 

To Sanitize Equipment: Use 4 tsp. powder per 1/2 gal. of water. Requires 5 min contact time, drip dry. To Sanitize Wine before adding yeast: Use 1/2 tsp. powder per 6 gal. of wine.

ingredients.name: Belgian Candi Syrup, Amber D-45 - 1lb
ingredients.description:
This syrup is actually made in Belgium, and is the same sugar that the breweries themselves are using to craft their smooth, rich, and malty beers that have been enchanting home brewers for years. 

Amber Candi Syrup possesses rich overtones of toffee and caramel.

ingredients.name: Hyperdrive RTD Dry Yeast, WHC - 11g
ingredients.description:
A specialized blend of yeast, nutrients and vitamins that contains
everything needed for sugar-based fermentations to produce a clean RTD
base for hard seltzer drinks or as a strong wash for further
distillation into vodka or gin. This yeast can produce a base product of
up to 18% within a five-day fermentation window.

ingredients.name: Verdant IPA Dry Ale Yeast, LalBrew® Lallemand - 11g
ingredients.description: Verdant IPA yeast is highly versatile and well suited for NEIPAs, Hazy IPAs, English IPAs and Bitters, American Pale Ales, Stouts, and many other beer styles. Specially selected in collaboration with Verdant Brewing Co. in the UK for its ability to produce a wide variety of hop-forward and malty beers. Prominent notes of apricot and undertones of tropical fruit and citrus merge seamlessly with hop aromas. With medium-high attenuation, LalBrew® Verdant IPA leaves a soft and balanced malt profile with slightly more body than a typical American IPA yeast strain.
ingredients.tasting_notes: Verdant IPA yeast is highly versatile and well suited for NEIPAs, Hazy IPAs, English IPAs and Bitters, American Pale Ales, Stouts, and many other beer styles. Specially selected in collaboration with Verdant Brewing Co. in the UK for its ability to produce a wide variety of hop-forward and malty beers. Prominent notes of apricot and undertones of tropical fruit and citrus merge seamlessly with hop aromas. With medium-high attenuation, LalBrew® Verdant IPA leaves a soft and balanced malt profile with slightly more body than a typical American IPA yeast strain.

ingredients.name: Monster Mill MM-2 3/8" Driveshaft Grain Mill - with Hopper and Base
Wine Conditioner 500 mL
ingredients.description:
To be added to wine after stabilizing and clearing to sweeten to taste.
Recommended dosage: 7 mL/L (1 ½ tsp/L)

services.name: Makers Fee
services.description: Our Makers Fee covers your use of the fermentation space and professional equipment for one batch. Staff are on hand throughout to guide and support you along the way.

services.name: Milling Fee
services.description: On-site grain milling before your brew session. Better extraction, fresher flavour.

services.name: Wine Carbonation
services.description: Add carbonation to your wine in-house. Beer and cider batches include carbonation at no extra charge.
